# Adnan Khan
> Marketing technology pioneer in Auckland, New Zealand. Co-Founder of
> Stitch (martech/adtech/media consultancy) and Stitch Predict (marketing
> mix modelling SaaS). Ex-Meta (5th in APAC), ex-Microsoft. 3x TVNZ
> Marketing Award winner including Supreme 2022. Part of Turners team
> that won 2x Gold Effie 2022. Global Effie Finalist 2023.

## Topics
Marketing Mix Modelling, Customer Data Platforms, Martech, Adtech, AI
Marketing, Privacy-First Measurement, Tealium, Meta Advertising,
First-Party Data.
